summary: Iteration 92 - Testing 6 fixes: Login/Register button contrast, mobile header titles, desktop homepage layout, AI Preferences i18n, hero search, floating island translations. All fixes verified working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Missing translation keys floatingIsland.hispaloAI and floatingIsland.aiAssistant in en.json - shows raw key names when expanded

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/products?search=olive returns array with 2 matching products
FRONTEND: Login page Email tab button has dark background (rgb(26,26,26)) and white text
FRONTEND: Login page Login submit button has dark background (bg-stone-900) and white text
FRONTEND: Register page Create Account button has dark background and white text
FRONTEND: Mobile (412px) Login page header uses small text (13px)
FRONTEND: Mobile (412px) Register page header uses small text with truncate (text-overflow: ellipsis)
FRONTEND: Desktop (1920px) Homepage uses max-w-5xl layout (1024px)
FRONTEND: Homepage hero search shows dropdown with product suggestions when typing
FRONTEND: Hero search clicking result navigates to /product/{id}
FRONTEND: Hero search pressing Enter navigates to /products?search=query
FRONTEND: AI Preferences page shows English labels (Communication Style, Dietary Preferences, Allergies, Goals, Budget)
FRONTEND: AI Preferences Save button works - shows 'Preferences saved' toast
FRONTEND: AI Preferences Reset button present
FRONTEND: Floating island component present on homepage
FRONTEND: floatingIsland.messages key translates to 'Messages' in EN locale
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add missing floatingIsland.hispaloAI and floatingIsland.aiAssistant translation keys to en.json, es.json, ko.json
critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedFloatingIsland.js lines 83-84 use t('floatingIsland.hispaloAI') and t('floatingIsland.aiAssistant') but these keys are missing from locale files - code has fallback but shows raw keys when expanded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 tested the 6 new fixes from this iteration. All button contrast issues on Login/Register pages are fixed (bg-stone-900 = rgb(26,26,26)). Homepage layout uses max-w-5xl (1024px). Hero search works with live suggestions. AI Preferences page is fully internationalized. Minor note: floatingIsland.hispaloAI and floatingIsland.aiAssistant keys are missing from locale files but have fallbacks in code.
